description: Remote Code Execution via JNDI lookup in Log4j 2
recommendation: Upgrade Log4j to 2.15.0 or later. If upgrade is not possible, set system property log4j2.formatMsgNoLookups=true.

description: RegreSSHion: Remote code execution in OpenSSH before 9.8p1
recommendation: Update OpenSSH to version 9.8p1 or newer. As a temporary mitigation, restrict SSH access to trusted networks.

description: Heap buffer overflow in NGINX 1.22.x can lead to remote code execution under specific conditions
recommendation: Upgrade NGINX to 1.24.0 or apply vendor patches. Disable unnecessary modules until patching.

description: Pre-auth RCE in Confluence Server before 8.5.0
recommendation: Patch immediately to the latest version. If patching is not possible, block external access to Confluence.

description: BlueKeep: Remote code execution vulnerability in RDP on Windows 7/2008R2
recommendation: Disable RDP or restrict access via firewall. Apply Microsoft patches. Consider enabling Network Level Authentication (NLA).
